title: Phyllotaxis Bloom
caption: A study in why nature's patterns aren't decoration — they're what efficient, patient growth looks like from the outside.

title: Fractal Branching
caption: Comparative study (River delta, lightning, lung bronchioles, bare root). Form optimized for energy minimization under spatial constraints.

title: Cymatics
caption: Symmetrical mandala pattern forming in fine sand on a vibrating black metal plate at pure tone frequencies.

title: Radiolaria Architecture
caption: Nature doesn't have a style. It has a rule, applied patiently enough that it starts to look like one.

title: Crystalline Growth
caption: Micro time-lapse analysis of facet crystallization expanding outward in a grid-like coordinate space.

title: Crystallization Error
caption: Incomplete crystallization study under polarized filter.
reason: Mineral density grew too fast, shattering the micro-lens array and fogging the plate.

title: Spiral Galaxy Diagram
caption: A face-on spiral galaxy showing granular star fields and black dust-lane voids, overlaid with a gold logarithmic spiral tracing the primary arm. Deliberately mirroring the Phyllotaxis Bloom diagram.

title: Orbital Resonance
caption: Moons and asteroid belts tracing stable resonant orbits. The geometric pattern accumulates over time, mirroring the cymatic sand mandalas.

title: Crater Field Topology
caption: Extreme low-angle raking light on overlapping planetary craters, forming a natural Voronoi mesh. 'Every scale we've looked at keeps saying the same thing back to us. We just needed to wait long enough to hear it.'

title: Nebula Filament Structure
caption: A dense star-forming nebula in charcoal, deep umber, and a cold cyan accent, tracing a fractal branching pattern of gas and dust.

title: Solar Corona Pulse
caption: A meditative pulse of solar plasma filaments rising along magnetic field lines. Restrained monochrome-orange, showcasing the geometry of solar magnetism.
